description: Male client Jude, early 20s. Came in confused about whether to bulk or cut, had been spinning his wheels for months — trying to bulk, getting too fat, then cutting and feeling skinny again. Used Tom's 3-tier system: strategic cut to strip the soft layer while keeping muscle, reverse diet to prime his metabolism, then quality muscle build on a lean frame. Result: built significant muscle and gained the confidence he was missing.

Male client Chris, middle-aged. Trained 3 days a week with Tom. Achieved a dramatic physique transformation through consistent effort and trusting the process — went from carrying significant body fat to a lean, muscular build. Shows what is achievable with genuine consistency over time.
